MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-25-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-26-2006 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for settlement on the record.
3:30 P.M. Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laura Martinez.
Charles Jarrell, Esq. for the Plaintiff: JMA Russian Hill LLC., present by Tod Chapman.
Nich Guglielemino, Esq. for Defendants: Franco Montarello & Patricia Montarello dba Little Joe's, and Varazze, Inc., Mr. Franco Montarello also present in court.
Parties have settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff will make a payment of $15,000.00 by check within 10 days, made out to Defendants' counsel, Leasing Agreement between the parties is terminated on Jan. 1, 2007, without any extension.
Defendants to vacate the property, with $10,000.00 relocation assistance within 10 days.

Parties agreed to terms, matter is deemed settled, trial vacated.
